## Annual General Meeting (AGM) Preparation Checklist
## 年度年会筹备清单

**Financial Year End / 财务年度截止日:** 31 March ______
**Target AGM Date / 目标年会日期:** *(must be within 6 months of financial year end)*
**Secretary Responsible / 负责秘书:**
**Treasurer Responsible / 负责财务官:**

---

### T-10 Weeks (10 weeks before AGM)
### 会前10周

- [ ] Confirm AGM date with Committee
- [ ] Book venue (or confirm video conference platform)
- [ ] Prepare list of positions coming up for election
- [ ] Call for nominations for Committee positions (send to all members)
- [ ] Treasurer begins preparation of annual financial statements
- [ ] President begins drafting President's Report

---

### T-6 Weeks
### 会前6周

- [ ] Nominations for Committee positions received and compiled
- [ ] Overseas Funding Register reviewed and annual disclosure summary prepared
- [ ] Check all officer disclosures in Interests Register are current — request updates from all officers
- [ ] Confirm Contact Person details are still current with Registrar
- [ ] Annual Report draft commenced (Secretary + President + Treasurer)

---

### T-3 Weeks (≥21 days before AGM — Notice requirement for special resolutions)
### 会前3周（特别决议须至少提前21天通知）

- [ ] **AGM Notice sent to ALL financial members** (minimum 21 days before AGM if special resolution proposed; 14 days otherwise)
- [ ] Notice includes: date, time, location/link, full agenda
- [ ] Any special resolutions (e.g., constitutional amendments) included in full in notice
- [ ] Annual Report and Financial Statements circulated with notice (or made available on request)
- [ ] Proxy voting form circulated

---

### T-1 Week
### 会前1周

- [ ] Financial statements finalised and approved by Committee for presentation to members
- [ ] Audit/review engagement completed (if required)
- [ ] Final Annual Report approved by Committee
- [ ] Quorum calculation confirmed (check current financial membership count)
- [ ] Voting papers prepared (if required for elections)
- [ ] Overseas Funding disclosure section of Annual Report finalised and confirmed:
  - [ ] Total overseas funding amount correct
  - [ ] AML/CFT self-assessment confirmations included
  - [ ] No financial gain confirmation included

---

### AGM Day
### 年会当天

- [ ] Quorum confirmed before meeting opens
- [ ] Minutes taker identified (usually Secretary)
- [ ] Meeting opened by Chairperson (usually President)
- [ ] Apologies noted
- [ ] Previous AGM minutes confirmed
- [ ] Annual Report received and adopted *(Resolution required)*
- [ ] Financial Statements received and adopted *(Resolution required)*
- [ ] Auditor/reviewer appointed (if required) *(Resolution required)*
- [ ] Membership subscription set for coming year *(Resolution required)*
- [ ] Elections conducted for all positions due for election
- [ ] All officer eligibility declarations signed by newly elected officers
- [ ] General business completed
- [ ] Next AGM date noted
- [ ] Meeting closed

---

### Within 20 Working Days of AGM
### 年会后20个工作日内

- [ ] AGM minutes finalised and circulated to members
- [ ] Any changes to Committee notified to Registrar of Incorporated Societies
- [ ] Contact Person details confirmed/updated with Registrar (if changed)
- [ ] Annual Return submitted to Charities Services (by due date as notified)
- [ ] Financial Statements filed with Charities Services
- [ ] Any constitutional amendments notified to Registrar (if passed at AGM)
- [ ] New officers added to bank account signatories (if applicable)
- [ ] Interests Register updated for all new officers
- [ ] New officer compliance onboarding Issues opened for any new officers

---

**AGM completed successfully:** ☐ Yes ☐ No (note issues in comments)
**Confirmed by Secretary:** ______________________ **Date:** ______________
**Confirmed by President:** ______________________ **Date:** ______________

*Reference: [AGM Report Template](../../finance_&_funding/agm_report_template.md)*
